'''鈭歾-w-ng-t''' ('''kazawngetoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:rumour|rumour]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-w-ng-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rumour|rumour]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歾-w-ng-t
|-
! Lemma
| kazawngetoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizawngetoko|thizawngetoko]] || [[word:jizawngetoko|jizawngetoko]] || [[word:shizawngetoko|shizawngetoko]] || [[word:kizawngetoko|kizawngetoko]]
|-

|-

|-
